LONG NAME: ESRD_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 

VALUES: Y = the beneficiary has ESRD coverage 
0 = the beneficiary does not have ESRD coverage 

COMMENT: This variable is sourced directly from Medicare eligibility data, and recoded into a binary classification.
